source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Readable research English UI with Japanese typography guidance for specimen labels, sensor tables, habitat records, command search, and long-form field notes.
layout: Research dashboards, specimen tables, sensor forms, 8px radii, mist-soft panels, bark dividers, emerald primary actions, lichen-muted metadata, and moss-texture asset examples.

prompts.label: Transparent cloud forest moss motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Cloud Forest transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete cloud forest moss motif for a design-system catalog, isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A dense tropical mountain cloud forest moss cluster: emerald cushion moss, velvety liverwort-like mats, tiny fern fronds, damp bark fragments, pearl mist droplets, and layered organic texture. Crisp botanical edges, atmospheric research-system character, no cast shadow.
Composition/framing: centered complete moss-and-bark cutout with generous padding, full silhouette visible without cropping, detailed enough to inform palette extraction and texture tokens.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal, uniform color only, no shadow, gradient, texture, reflection, floor plane, watermark, or text.
Constraints: do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject, no landscape background, no terrarium, no hand, no tools, no animals, no label text, no logo.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Cloud Forest light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named Morphous Cloud Forest, derived from a tropical mountain cloud forest moss motif.
Canvas: exact 16:9 composition intended for 3840x2160 export, polished atmospheric research-system presentation, clean grid, large readable labels.
System feel: atmospheric research system for field ecology, specimen tracking, mist sensor dashboards, and moss habitat records.
Required visible sections: Morphous Cloud Forest, Cloud Forest Moss, Light Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Palette direction: emerald moss, mist white, wet bark, fern shadow, lichen silver, canopy fog, small warm bark signal. Keep color names visible and text large.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, navigation groups, sidebar, command palette, tables, metrics, charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing, radius, borders, shadows, and token swatches.
Visual language: quiet research workstation, translucent mist panels, moss-texture micro patterns, bark dividers, emerald primary actions, restrained scientific data visualization, 8px radius components.
Constraints: no generic green gradient UI, no neon palette, no one-note green surface, no landscape photo background, no animals, no tiny unreadable text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Cloud Forest.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Cloud Forest dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn board for Morphous Cloud Forest that feels like the light research-system board translated to dark mode.
Canvas: exact 16:9 composition intended for 3840x2160 export, polished professional design-system presentation, clean grid, large readable labels.
System feel: atmospheric research system for field ecology, specimen tracking, mist sensor dashboards, and moss habitat records at night or under canopy shade.
Required visible sections: Morphous Cloud Forest, Cloud Forest Moss, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Palette direction: deep bark background, fern-shadow panels, emerald moss primary, mist-white foreground, lichen-silver muted labels, wet-bark borders, small warm bark signal. Keep swatch names visible and text large.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, navigation groups, sidebar, command palette, tables, metrics, charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing, radius, borders, shadows, and token swatches.
Visual language: quiet dark research workstation, canopy fog glow, moss-texture micro patterns, bark dividers, emerald focus rings, restrained scientific data visualization, 8px radius components.
Constraints: no generic black UI, no neon palette, no one-note green surface, no landscape photo background, no animals, no tiny unreadable text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Cloud Forest.
